---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for PADI.AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🎯 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to add.

## 🤔 Problem It Solves
What problem or gap does this feature address? Link to relevant planning docs if applicable.

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the feature and how it might work.

## 🔀 Alternatives Considered
Other ways this could be implemented.

## 📚 Related Planning Docs
Link to relevant sections in:
- Product Plan (02-product-plan.md)
- PRD (03-07-prd-stageX.md)
- Engineering spec (ENG-00X-stageX.md)

## 👥 Affected Users
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Parents
- [ ] Teachers
- [ ] Admins/internal

## ⏱️ Stage
When should this be built?
- [ ] Stage 1 (Diagnostic)
- [ ] Stage 2 (Learning Plan)
- [ ] Stage 3 (AI Tutoring)
- [ ] Stage 4 (MVP)
- [ ] Stage 5 (MMP)
- [ ] Stage 6+ (Post-MMP)

## 🔒 COPPA/Security Considerations
Does this involve student data or require COPPA review?
- [ ] Yes — needs legal review
- [ ] No — routine feature

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] This feature is aligned with project vision
- [ ] I've checked planning docs for related work
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for duplicates

## 📝 Additional Context
Sketches, mockups, research, etc.?
